decisions.WeightedRandomSampler: Applied — imbalance ratio is 3.36x (threshold 1.5x). Largest: dog (4863), Smallest: elephant (1446)
decisions.ClassWeightedLoss: Applied — reinforces sampler, penalises errors on minority classes more
decisions.CorruptFilter: Applied — 0 corrupt files removed before training
decisions.ResizeTo224: Applied — raw sizes vary from 60 to 6720px width; EfficientNet-B3 requires 224×224
decisions.HeavyAugmentation: Applied — high size variance and real-world photo variation requires strong augmentation to generalise
